subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, Batul! Render thanks unto God that thou art accepted at the Threshold of the Divine Oneness and art numbered among the handmaidens of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله بتول حمد کن خدا را که در درگاه احدیت مقبول و در بین اماء رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement
